index.description: A comma-separated list of index names; use `_all` or empty string to perform the operation on all indices

fields.description: A comma-separated list of field names

ignore_unavailable.description: Whether specified concrete indices should be ignored when unavailable (missing or closed)

allow_no_indices.description: Whether to allow (1) wildcard index expressions that match no indices and (2) requests where the final resolved set is empty.

expand_wildcards.description: Whether to expand wildcard expression to concrete indices that are open, closed or both.

include_unmapped.description: Indicates whether unmapped fields should be included in the response.

filters.description: An optional set of filters: can include +metadata,-metadata,-nested,-multifield,-parent

types.description: Only return results for fields that have one of the types in the list

body.description: An index filter specified with the Query DSL
